steps.name: run-analysis
steps.stdout:
Replication of attention-intimacy effect
Dataset: ohtsubo data.csv
Sample sizes -> Attention (1): 21, No Attention (0): 20
Means (SD) -> Attention: 22.86 (6.04), No Attention: 20.85 (5.61)
Welch t-test: t = 1.102, p = 0.277
Cohen's d = 0.34

Results written to /app/data/replication_results.txt
